sub_en: Where are we on the 1996–2002 telecom/fiber/dotcom clock — 1997 or 1999? Each of 7 analogue pairs places today's value on its 1995–2002 curve (nearest neighbour on level + 1-yr slope); the weighted median is the clock, and the DISPERSION of the seven readings is itself the structural-difference signal. /scenario gives forward probabilities; this card gives the historical coordinate. Analogy is not causality — n=1 sample.
sub_zh: 對齊 1996–2002 電信／光纖／網路週期，本輪時鐘讀到幾年幾月——1997 還是 1999？七組類比各自把今日數值放上 1995–2002 的歷史曲線（以水準＋一年斜率找最近鄰）；加權中位數是時鐘，七個讀數的「分歧度」本身就是結構性差異訊號。/scenario 給前瞻機率，本卡給歷史座標。類比不是因果——歷史樣本只有一次。
method_en: L1 curated mapping dictionary (why each mapping holds / where it breaks) · L2 curated 1995–2002 quarterly series (T2/T3 reconstructions) · L3 nearest-neighbour clock engine · L4/L5 Claude or rules. Estimates are estimates; every number carries a tier and an as-of date. Not investment advice.
method_zh: L1 人工策展類比映射字典（為何成立／哪裡失效）· L2 策展 1995–2002 季度序列（T2/T3 重建值）· L3 最近鄰時鐘引擎 · L4/L5 Claude 或規則後備。估計就是估計；每個數字都帶證據層級與資料時點。非投資建議。
disclaimer_en: Historical analogy for strategic framing only — not investment advice.
disclaimer_zh: 歷史類比僅供策略框架參考——非投資建議。

pairs.name_zh: 超大規模雲端資本支出年增率
pairs.counterpart_zh: 1990s 電信業者資本支出年增率

today.source_en: Latest-quarter capex YoY, 5 hyperscalers summed — aligned to /aibubble capex.agg.yoy 2026-07-02. TTM total $489.5B aligned to /payback live yfinance 2026-07-02 (MSFT 97.2 / GOOGL 109.9 / AMZN 151.0 / META 75.7 / ORCL 55.7). 1-yr slope (+18pp) is a T3 estimate.
today.source_zh: 五巨頭最新季 capex 合計年增率——對齊 /aibubble capex.agg.yoy 2026-07-02。TTM 合計 $489.5B 對齊 /payback live yfinance 2026-07-02（MSFT 97.2 / GOOGL 109.9 / AMZN 151.0 / META 75.7 / ORCL 55.7）。一年斜率（+18pp）為 T3 推估。

pairs.reason_en: Today 80.6% (1-yr Δ 18.0) sits nearest 2000Q2 (33.0%, Δ 7.0); today exceeds the whole 1995–2002 range — no true coordinate.
pairs.reason_zh: 今日 80.6%（一年變化 18.0）最近鄰為 2000Q2（33.0%，變化 7.0）；今日值超出 1995–2002 全區間——類比已無真座標。
pairs.why_en: Both measure how fast the era's richest demand carriers are pouring concrete: network build-out then, compute build-out now. Capex growth is the cycle's throttle in both.
pairs.why_zh: 兩者都在量測該時代最有錢的需求載體砸實體建設的速度：當年鋪網路、現在蓋算力。資本支出增速在兩輪都是週期油門。
pairs.breaks_en: 1990s telecom capex was debt-funded by levered CLECs and incumbents — the 2001 capex crash was a solvency event. Hyperscalers fund from operating cash flow (capex/OCF ~75% but still FCF-generative, A/AA-rated); a demand wobble cuts capex, it does not bankrupt the builder.
pairs.breaks_zh: 1990s 電信資本支出靠高槓桿 CLEC 與電信商舉債——2001 的資本支出崩塌是償付能力事件。超大規模雲端用營運現金流自籌（capex/OCF 約 75% 但仍產生自由現金流、A/AA 評級）；需求轉弱是砍 capex，不是把建設者砍破產。

today.source_en: EST — constant-capability LLM token prices are falling roughly 60–90%/yr (published Epoch/a16z-style estimates); −75%/yr taken as midpoint. Slope (deflation deepening ~10pp/yr) is a rough estimate.
today.source_zh: 推估——同能力等級 LLM token 價格約年跌 60–90%（Epoch/a16z 類公開估計）；取中值 −75%/yr。斜率（通縮每年加深約 10pp）為粗估。

pairs.reason_en: Today -75.0%/yr (1-yr Δ -10.0) sits nearest 2002Q2 (-60.0%/yr, Δ -9.0); today exceeds the whole 1995–2002 range — no true coordinate.
pairs.reason_zh: 今日 -75.0%/yr（一年變化 -10.0）最近鄰為 2002Q2（-60.0%/yr，變化 -9.0）；今日值超出 1995–2002 全區間——類比已無真座標。
pairs.why_en: Both are the unit price of the era's core deliverable — bit transport then, token inference now — collapsing as capacity and efficiency compound.
pairs.why_zh: 兩者都是該時代核心交付物的單價——當年是位元傳輸、現在是 token 推論——在產能與效率複利下崩跌。
pairs.breaks_en: The 90s per-bit collapse was glut-driven: prices fell below cash cost while ~95% of fiber sat dark. Token deflation so far is mostly efficiency-driven (algorithms + new silicon), and demand elasticity has kept total inference revenue RISING through the price fall — the opposite of stranded fiber.
pairs.breaks_zh: 90 年代每位元崩跌是過剩驅動：價格跌破現金成本、約 95% 光纖未點亮。token 通縮至今主要是效率驅動（演算法＋新晶片），且需求彈性讓推論總營收在降價中仍上升——與擱淺光纖正好相反。

pairs.name_zh: GPU 現貨租金 ÷ 損益兩平
pairs.counterpart_en: Wholesale bandwidth price vs cost (dark fiber era)
pairs.counterpart_zh: 批發頻寬價格對成本（暗光纖時代）

today.source_en: H100 SXM spot median $2.14/hr ÷ breakeven-band midpoint $1.60 (band $1.30–1.90) — aligned to /aibubble frontier.gpu_spot 2026-07-02 (vast.ai listings). Breakeven band is itself an estimate; 1-yr slope (−0.4x) EST from 2025 rent declines.
today.source_zh: H100 SXM 現貨中位數 $2.14/hr ÷ 損益兩平帶中點 $1.60（帶 $1.30–1.90）——對齊 /aibubble frontier.gpu_spot 2026-07-02（vast.ai 掛牌）。損益兩平帶本身即為估計值；一年斜率（−0.4x）依 2025 租金下滑推估。

pairs.why_en: The cleanest overbuild gauge in both eras: does the marginal unit of infrastructure earn above its all-in cost? Wholesale bandwidth then, GPU-hours now.
pairs.why_zh: 兩個時代最乾淨的過度建設量表：邊際一單位基礎設施能否賺回全成本？當年是批發頻寬，現在是 GPU 時。
pairs.breaks_en: Fiber lasts 25+ years and 95% sat dark — a glut could persist for a decade. GPUs depreciate in 4–6 years (self-correcting supply), spot still clears ABOVE breakeven, and power/CoWoS/HBM scarcity caps supply in a way fiber never was.
pairs.breaks_zh: 光纖壽命 25 年以上且 95% 未點亮——過剩可拖十年。GPU 4–6 年折舊（供給會自我修正）、現貨仍高於損益兩平，且電力/CoWoS/HBM 稀缺對供給設了光纖時代從未有過的上限。

pairs.name_zh: 循環／供應商融資 ÷ 年度資本支出

today.source_en: EST, definitional caveat — announced circular-deal ledger $529.3B (aligned to /aibubble circularity ledger 2026-07-02; deal detail lives there, not re-maintained here) ÷ TTM hyperscaler capex $489.5B. Numerator is CUMULATIVE multi-year commitments vs a one-year denominator — treat as an upper bound.
today.source_zh: 推估，含口徑警語——已公告循環交易台帳 $529.3B（對齊 /aibubble 循環台帳 2026-07-02；交易明細在該卡維護，本卡不重複）÷ 超大規模 TTM capex $489.5B。分子是「累計多年期承諾」對上一年期分母——視為上界。

pairs.reason_en: Today 108.1% (1-yr Δ 45.0) sits nearest 2000Q2 (23.0%, Δ 11.2); today exceeds the whole 1995–2002 range — no true coordinate.
pairs.reason_zh: 今日 108.1%（一年變化 45.0）最近鄰為 2000Q2（23.0%，變化 11.2）；今日值超出 1995–2002 全區間——類比已無真座標。
pairs.why_en: Both are the supplier financing its own demand: revenue quality degrades when the vendor's balance sheet (or equity) stands behind the customer's purchase order.
pairs.why_zh: 兩者都是供應商在融資自己的需求：當賣方的資產負債表（或股權）站在客戶採購單背後，營收品質就在劣化。
pairs.breaks_en: Lucent/Nortel lent cash to CLECs that went insolvent — credit risk crystallized as writedowns. Today's loops are mostly equity stakes and multi-year compute commitments among cash-rich counterparties; but OpenAI-scale commitments against a $25B revenue run-rate rhyme with the pattern.
pairs.breaks_zh: Lucent/Nortel 把現金借給後來破產的 CLEC——信用風險以減記兌現。今日的循環多是現金充裕方之間的股權入股與多年期算力承諾；但 OpenAI 級承諾對上 $25B 營收 run-rate，韻腳仍像。

today.source_en: EST — S&P Dow Jones Indices factsheet-style top-10 weight ≈40% as of mid-2026; 1-yr slope (+2.5pp) approximate. Related live gauge: /aibubble concentration sub-score.
today.source_zh: 推估——依 S&P 道瓊指數 factsheet 類數據，2026 年中前十大權重約 40%；一年斜率（+2.5pp）為近似。相關即時量表見 /aibubble 集中度子分數。

pairs.reason_en: Today 40.1% (1-yr Δ 2.5) sits nearest 2000Q1 (26.8%, Δ 4.2); today exceeds the whole 1995–2002 range — no true coordinate.
pairs.reason_zh: 今日 40.1%（一年變化 2.5）最近鄰為 2000Q1（26.8%，變化 4.2）；今日值超出 1995–2002 全區間——類比已無真座標。
pairs.why_en: Both measure how much of the market one theme carries — passive-flow reflexivity, index fragility, and the crowding of the marginal dollar into the same ten tickers.
pairs.why_zh: 兩者都量測整個市場押在單一主題上的比重——被動資金反身性、指數脆弱度、邊際資金擠進同十檔的擁擠度。
pairs.breaks_en: Today's top-10 earn roughly a quarter to a third of S&P earnings with real cash flows; 2000's leaders (Cisco at ~200x) were priced on forward hope. Concentration is HIGHER than 2000, but the earnings floor under it is far thicker.
pairs.breaks_zh: 今日前十大貢獻標普約四分之一到三分之一的「真實」盈餘與現金流；2000 年的領頭羊（Cisco 約 200 倍）是靠想像定價。集中度比 2000 更高，但下面墊的盈餘地板厚得多。

pairs.counterpart_zh: 1997–2000 高收益利差（電信占比高）

today.source_en: FRED BAMLH0A0HYM2, 2026-07-01 (canonical platform number). 1-yr slope −0.40pp approximated from the path (3m ago 3.16% — aligned to /aibubble hy_oas 2026-06-30).
today.source_zh: FRED BAMLH0A0HYM2，2026-07-01（平台共用基準值）。一年斜率 −0.40pp 依路徑近似（3 個月前 3.16%——對齊 /aibubble hy_oas 2026-06-30）。

pairs.why_en: Credit prices late-cycle complacency and cracks first: in 1999–2000 the telecom-heavy HY index cracked a full year before NASDAQ's peak-and-fall completed.
pairs.why_zh: 信用市場為後段自滿定價、也最先裂開：1999–2000 電信占比高的高收益指數比那斯達克見頂完成早整整一年裂開。
pairs.breaks_en: The AI build is equity/OCF-funded and HY has little direct AI exposure — unlike 2000, when telecom was roughly a third of the HY index. Today's tight OAS may say less about AI than 2000's OAS said about telecom; the equivalent stress may hide in private credit.
pairs.breaks_zh: 本輪 AI 建設靠股權與營運現金流，高收益債對 AI 的直接曝險很低——不像 2000 年電信約占高收益指數三分之一。今日的窄利差對 AI 的資訊量，可能遠低於 2000 年利差對電信的資訊量；等價的壓力可能藏在私募信貸。

pairs.name_zh: 前沿實驗室：累計募資 ÷ 營收
pairs.counterpart_zh: 虧損 dotcom 的募資倍數

today.source_en: EST — (OpenAI $122B funding + Anthropic $95B) ÷ (OpenAI $25B revenue run-rate + Anthropic $12B) = 5.9x. Aligned to /payback KB v2 2026-07-02 (OpenAI IPO-filing valuation $850B; Anthropic Series-H $965B, context only). Slope −0.5x EST: revenue is ramping faster than funding — an anti-1999 signal.
today.source_zh: 推估——（OpenAI 累計募資 $122B＋Anthropic $95B）÷（OpenAI 營收 run-rate $25B＋Anthropic $12B）＝5.9x。對齊 /payback KB v2 2026-07-02（OpenAI IPO 申報估值 $850B；Anthropic Series-H $965B，僅供脈絡）。斜率 −0.5x 推估：營收爬升快於募資——是「反 1999」訊號。

pairs.why_en: Both are the era's demand engine priced on promise while burning cash: dotcoms carried telecom demand, frontier labs carry compute demand. If the funding window shuts, the demand under the capex evaporates the same way.
pairs.why_zh: 兩者都是該時代「靠承諾定價、邊燒現金」的需求引擎：dotcom 撐起電信需求，前沿實驗室撐起算力需求。募資窗口一關，capex 底下的需求就會用同一種方式蒸發。
pairs.breaks_en: The top-2 labs have real revenue ($37B combined run-rate, growing >100%/yr) versus 1999 dotcoms' near-zero revenue, and the multiple is COMPRESSING, not expanding. But their multi-year compute commitments exceed the funding actually raised — the fragility moved from revenue to commitments.
pairs.breaks_zh: 頭部兩家實驗室有真實營收（合計 run-rate $37B、年增逾 100%），不像 1999 dotcom 幾乎零營收，且倍數在壓縮而非擴張。但它們的多年期算力承諾超過實際募到的錢——脆弱點從營收移到了承諾。

composite.dispersion_en: structurally divergent — the eras differ where it matters
composite.dispersion_zh: 結構性偏離——兩個時代在關鍵處不像
composite.answer_en: Closer to 1999 than 1997: composite 1998.8 ± 1.5. But the pairs disagree: High-yield OAS path reads 1997Q1 while Per-token price deflation reads 2002Q2 — the dispersion IS the message: part of this cycle has no 1990s coordinate.
composite.answer_zh: 比較像 1999 而非 1997：合成讀數 1998.8 ± 1.5。 但各組配對不同調：高收益債利差路徑讀 1997Q1、每 token 價格通縮讀 2002Q2——分歧本身就是訊息：本輪有一段在 90 年代沒有座標。

clock_take.summary_en: The composite reads 1998.75 (1998Q4) ± 1.47, cycle-position 75/100 — squarely late cycle, the late-1998/1999 zone. But the ±1.47 dispersion is structural, not noise: 4 of 7 pairs read beyond the 1995–2002 range entirely. Capex YoY (80.6%), vendor financing (108.1% of capex) and top-10 weight (40.1%) all pin to 2000Q1–Q2 with near-zero confidence — they are off the historical scale, not comfortably 1999. Meanwhile HY OAS at 2.75% reads 1997Q1 (conf 0.888) and lab funding/revenue at 5.9x reads 1998Q4 (conf 0.522). The clock is a coordinate, not a forecast: the wide spread says the analogy is strained precisely where it matters — funding structure and valuation.
clock_take.summary_zh: 綜合時鐘讀數為1998.75（1998Q4），誤差±1.47，週期位置75/100，明確落在1998年末至1999年的晚週期區。但±1.47的離散是結構性的，非雜訊：七對中有四對完全超出1995–2002歷史區間。資本支出年增80.6%、循環融資佔資本支出108.1%、標普前十權重40.1%，皆對應2000Q1–Q2但信心近零，已脫離歷史刻度。同時高收益利差2.75%讀作1997Q1（信心0.888），前沿實驗室融資／營收5.9倍讀作1998Q4（信心0.522）。時鐘是座標非預測：如此大的離散顯示，恰在融資結構與估值這些關鍵處，類比最為勉強。

like_1999.en: Capex pace rhymes hard: hyperscaler capex is +80.6% YoY (1y Δ +18.0), pinning to 2000Q2 — the same vertical build-out slope seen as telecom capex peaked into 2000.
like_1999.zh: 資本支出步調高度相似：超大規模業者資本支出年增80.6%（一年變化+18.0），對應2000Q2——與電信資本支出衝向2000年高峰的垂直斜率如出一轍。

like_1999.en: Circular/vendor financing has exploded to 108.1% of annual capex (1y Δ +45.0), echoing Lucent/Nortel vendor loans — chips-for-equity and prepaid-compute loops now exceed a full year of build spend.
like_1999.zh: 循環／廠商融資暴增至年度資本支出的108.1%（一年變化+45.0），呼應Lucent／Nortel的廠商貸款——晶片換股權與預付算力迴圈規模已超過整年建設支出。

like_1999.en: Index concentration matches the peak: S&P 500 top-10 weight is 40.1% (1y Δ +2.5), reading 2000Q1 — the same narrow-leadership fragility as the 2000 top.
like_1999.zh: 指數集中度與高峰相符：標普500前十權重達40.1%（一年變化+2.5），讀作2000Q1——與2000年頂部相同的窄幅領漲脆弱性。

like_1999.en: Loss-making demand engines rhyme: frontier labs run at 5.9x funding/revenue (reads 1998Q4), the same capital-ahead-of-cashflow dynamic that fed the fiber demand story.
like_1999.zh: 虧損的需求引擎相似：前沿實驗室融資／營收達5.9倍（讀作1998Q4），與當年餵養光纖需求故事的「資本超前現金流」動態相同。

structurally_unlike.en: Funding structure is inverted: 1990s telecom capex was debt-funded by levered CLECs and incumbents — the 2001 crash was a solvency event. Today's build is funded from hyperscaler operating cash flow, and top-10 firms earn roughly a quarter to a third of S&P earnings with real cash — unlike Cisco at ~200x on forward hopes.
structurally_unlike.zh: 融資結構相反：1990年代電信資本支出由高槓桿CLEC與現有業者舉債支應，2001年崩盤是償付能力事件。今日建設由超大規模業者營運現金流支應，前十大企業以真實現金賺取標普約四分之一至三分之一的獲利——不同於當年思科約200倍的遠期夢想估值。

structurally_unlike.en: Physical scarcity, not glut: the 90s saw ~95% of fiber sit dark with prices below cash cost. Today power, CoWoS packaging and HBM are the binding constraints — GPU spot rent still sits at 1.34x breakeven, the opposite of a supply overhang.
structurally_unlike.zh: 是實體稀缺而非過剩：1990年代約95%光纖閒置、價格跌破現金成本。今日電力、CoWoS封裝與HBM才是瓶頸——GPU現貨租金仍為損益平衡的1.34倍，與供給過剩恰恰相反。

structurally_unlike.en: Depreciation life self-corrects: fiber lasts 25+ years, so a glut could persist a decade. GPUs depreciate in 4–6 years — supply retires itself fast, so any overbuild corrects in quarters, not a lost decade.
structurally_unlike.zh: 折舊年限自我修正：光纖壽命超過25年，過剩可延續十年。GPU折舊僅4–6年——供給自行快速退役，任何過度建設以數季修正，而非失落的十年。

structurally_unlike.en: Credit-market exposure is small: HY OAS at 2.75% reads 1997Q1, and AI has little direct HY presence — unlike 2000 when telecom was roughly a third of the HY index.
structurally_unlike.zh: 信用市場曝險小：高收益利差2.75%讀作1997Q1，AI在高收益債中直接佔比極低——不同於2000年電信約佔高收益指數三分之一。

structurally_unlike.en: Demand engines have real revenue: token deflation (-75%/yr) is so far efficiency-driven, not glut-driven below cash cost, and top-2 labs run ~$37B combined run-rate growing >100%/yr versus 1999 dotcoms' near-zero revenue.
structurally_unlike.zh: 需求引擎有真實營收：代幣通縮（每年-75%）迄今主要由效率驅動，而非跌破現金成本的過剩；前二大實驗室合計約370億美元年化營收且年增逾100%，不同於1999年營收近零的網路公司。

jumps.condition_en: GPU spot rent falls below the breakeven band (ratio <1.0) and stays there a full quarter — signalling genuine supply glut rather than scarcity.
jumps.condition_zh: GPU現貨租金跌破損益平衡帶（比率<1.0）並維持整季——顯示真正供給過剩而非稀缺。

jumps.condition_en: A top-5 lab fails to close a funding round and cuts compute commitments — the funding window shuts for the demand engine.
jumps.condition_zh: 前五大實驗室之一無法完成募資並削減算力承諾——需求引擎的融資窗口關閉。

jumps.condition_en: HY OAS widens past 4.5% with AI-adjacent credit (neocloud / datacenter private credit) leading the spread widening.
jumps.condition_zh: 高收益利差擴大逾4.5%，且由AI相關信用（neocloud／資料中心私募信貸）領漲利差。

jumps.condition_en: Hyperscaler capex guidance turns negative YoY for two consecutive quarters — the self-funded build finally rolls over.
jumps.condition_zh: 超大規模業者資本支出指引連續兩季年增轉負——自籌資金的建設終於反轉。

jumps.condition_en: Token demand elasticity breaks: total inference revenue falls while per-token prices keep dropping — deflation stops being efficiency-driven.
jumps.condition_zh: 代幣需求彈性破裂：推論總營收下滑而每代幣價格仍續跌——通縮不再由效率驅動。

jumps.condition_en: Lab revenue keeps compounding >100%/yr so funding/revenue multiple compresses below 4x (from today's 5.9x).
jumps.condition_zh: 實驗室營收持續年增逾100%，使融資／營收倍數自今日5.9倍壓縮至4倍以下。

forward_movers.en: GPU spot rent ÷ breakeven (today 1.34x): track the drift toward 1.0 as new capacity lands.
forward_movers.zh: GPU現貨租金÷損益平衡（今日1.34倍）：追蹤新產能上線後向1.0的下滑。

forward_movers.en: Vendor/circular financing as % of capex (today 108.1%): rising ratio and any counterparty distress in the chips-for-equity loops.
forward_movers.zh: 廠商／循環融資佔資本支出比（今日108.1%）：比率上升及晶片換股權迴圈中任何交易對手困境。

forward_movers.en: HY OAS and AI-adjacent private credit spreads (today OAS 2.75%): watch neocloud and datacenter credit for early widening.
forward_movers.zh: 高收益利差及AI相關私募信貸利差（今日利差2.75%）：留意neocloud與資料中心信貸的早期擴大。

forward_movers.en: Hyperscaler capex guidance YoY (today +80.6%): first deceleration or negative print on earnings calls.
forward_movers.zh: 超大規模業者資本支出指引年增（今日+80.6%）：財報會議首度減速或轉負。

forward_movers.en: Per-token price vs total inference revenue (deflation -75%/yr): flag if revenue turns down while prices keep falling.
forward_movers.zh: 每代幣價格對比推論總營收（通縮每年-75%）：若營收下滑而價格續跌則示警。

forward_movers.en: S&P 500 top-10 weight (today 40.1%) and leaders' realized vs forward earnings: monitor concentration and any multiple re-rating.
forward_movers.zh: 標普500前十權重（今日40.1%）及領導股實現對比遠期獲利：監控集中度與任何估值重評。

backdrop.name_zh: 那斯達克綜合指數（季收盤，近似）
backdrop.source_en: Public market data; quarterly closes rounded/approximate. Peak: 2000-03-10 intraday 5132.
backdrop.source_zh: 公開市場數據；季收盤為近似整理值。峰值：2000-03-10 盤中 5132。

blind_spots_en: Analogy is not causality — the clock is a coordinate, not a forecast. /scenario carries the forward probabilities.
n=1 historical sample: one telecom/dotcom cycle. Readings 'beyond range' mean the analogue simply has no coordinate for today's value.
The mapping choices themselves are assumptions — each pair carries its own tier, and the where-it-breaks column is the epistemic core of this card, not a footnote.
Historical series are approximate reconstructions (quarterly values interpolated between anchors, T2/T3) — treat clock readings as ±2 quarters at best.
Today's inputs mix T1 report data with T3 estimates (token price, funding multiples, top-10 share); the composite inherits the weakest input.
Sibling snapshots (/aibubble, /payback, /flows) are read best-effort at refresh; if absent the card silently uses seeds dated as marked.
blind_spots_zh: 類比不是因果——時鐘是座標不是預測。前瞻機率在 /scenario。
歷史樣本 n=1：只有一次電信／網路週期。「超出區間」的讀數代表類比對今日數值根本沒有座標。
映射選擇本身就是假設——每組配對各帶證據層級，「哪裡失效」欄是本卡的認識論核心，不是註腳。
歷史序列為近似重建（季度值於錨點間內插，T2/T3）——時鐘讀數最好視為 ±2 季。
今日輸入混雜 T1 財報數據與 T3 推估（token 價格、募資倍數、前十大權重）；合成讀數繼承最弱的輸入。
兄弟卡 snapshot（/aibubble、/payback、/flows）於刷新時盡力讀取；不存在時靜默改用標注日期的種子值。
